_meta.description: Collector-derived contract for the Adoption metrics tab.

summary_metrics.label: Tracked image lanes
summary_metrics.derivation: Count all variant-branch lanes from docs/data/variant-publishers.json.

summary_metrics.label: Lanes with image pull data
summary_metrics.derivation: Count lanes whose pull_count is non-null after joining container registry API data (e.g., GHCR package statistics) from docs/data/.

summary_metrics.label: Lanes with countme data
summary_metrics.derivation: Count lanes whose countme_active_devices is non-null after joining Fedora countme infrastructure data from docs/data/.

trust_cards.derivation: Trust metadata for bluefin read directly from docs/data/variant-publishers.json emits_sbom/emits_cve_scan/emits_cosign_attestation fields.
Trust metadata for bluefin-lts read directly from docs/data/variant-publishers.json emits_sbom/emits_cve_scan/emits_cosign_attestation fields.
Trust metadata for aurora read directly from docs/data/variant-publishers.json emits_sbom/emits_cve_scan/emits_cosign_attestation fields.
Trust metadata for bazzite read directly from docs/data/variant-publishers.json emits_sbom/emits_cve_scan/emits_cosign_attestation fields.
Trust metadata for dakota read directly from docs/data/variant-publishers.json emits_sbom/emits_cve_scan/emits_cosign_attestation fields.

trust_cards.state_reason: publisher_repo and org are unknown for this variant; trust-summary card requires repo-owned evidence to be meaningful.
trust_cards.derivation: Trust metadata for flatcar read directly from docs/data/variant-publishers.json emits_sbom/emits_cve_scan/emits_cosign_attestation fields.

rows.derivation: Distro-wide countme active-device count transplanted from repo-owned docs/data/adoption-countme-migrated.json (snapshot week 2026-03-16 to 2026-03-22). The same value is reused for each tracked branch because the source has no branch dimension.

Distro-wide countme active-device count transplanted from repo-owned docs/data/adoption-countme-migrated.json (snapshot week 2026-03-16 to 2026-03-22). The same value is reused for each tracked branch because the source has no branch dimension.

rows.state_reason: No registry pull-count data (GHCR or container registry API) or active-device data (Fedora countme infrastructure) is tracked in docs/data/ for this lane.
rows.derivation: Lane derived from docs/data/variant-publishers.json bluefin-lts.branches; no registry pull-count data (GHCR API) or Fedora countme data found in docs/data/.

rows.state_reason: No registry pull-count data (GHCR or container registry API) or active-device data (Fedora countme infrastructure) is tracked in docs/data/ for this lane.
rows.derivation: Lane derived from docs/data/variant-publishers.json bluefin-lts.branches; no registry pull-count data (GHCR API) or Fedora countme data found in docs/data/.

Distro-wide countme active-device count transplanted from repo-owned docs/data/adoption-countme-migrated.json (snapshot week 2026-03-16 to 2026-03-22). The same value is reused for each tracked branch because the source has no branch dimension.

rows.state_reason: No registry pull-count data (GHCR or container registry API) or active-device data (Fedora countme infrastructure) is tracked in docs/data/ for this lane.
